assertions.assertion: Mentions audience mismatch as a common cause — Audience in JwtBearerOptions must match the ApiResource name in IdentityServer
assertions.rationale: Section 1 explicitly describes audience mismatch and states 'The Audience in your JwtBearerOptions must exactly match the ApiResource name configured in IdentityServer'

assertions.assertion: Mentions the importance of ValidTypes = ['at+jwt'] and warns about JWT confusion attacks without it
assertions.rationale: Section 2 covers ValidTypes with at+jwt, explicitly mentions 'JWT confusion attack vector' and explains the security risk

assertions.assertion: Mentions scope claim format inconsistency — space-delimited vs array — as a cause of silent authorization failures
assertions.rationale: Section 3 explains both formats, warns about 'Silent authorization failures', and recommends IClaimsTransformation to normalize

assertions.assertion: Mentions checking the middleware pipeline ordering (UseAuthentication before UseAuthorization)
assertions.rationale: Section 4 covers middleware ordering with correct and incorrect code examples
